title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Agility India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Agility India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Agility India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Hyderabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Agility India:
Agility India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Agility India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
